context.revisionGoal: Validate a narrow local target-refinement checkpoint and preserve the distinction between local model refinement and broader section or whole-sequence work.

predictedStrengths: Active content is concentrated enough to make the lead target legible.
Frame-to-frame density remains stable through the sampled checkpoint.
predictedRisks: Scene spread is too tight; add restrained support targets before polishing detail.
Family balance is narrow; current output relies entirely on Arches.
Active centroid is static across the sampled frames.
prediction.predictionSummary: Sparse tree-only checkpoint reconstructed from authoritative render data.

truth.truthSummary: Authoritative xLights frames joined onto cached whole-layout geometry.

strengths: Active content is concentrated enough to make the lead target legible.

weaknesses: Scene spread is too tight; add restrained support targets before polishing detail.

recommendedNextMoves: Broaden the active footprint with one secondary support family while preserving the lead target.
